title: Volkswagen’s new e-bike has a rearview camera, radar, and fighter-pilot smart glasses
summary: The Volkswagen eBike, manufactured by n+ under licence, features a rear-mounted camera that streams a live feed to a handlebar display, radar-activated blind-spot alerts, a smart helmet with crash detection, and HUD glasses that project navigation and safety warnings into the rider’s…
